title: The Sphere of the Lycanthrope
overview: John Hammond (David Stay -“Photon”, “Dahmer vs Gacy”, “Tres Caminos”)  is a high school professor transferred to another school for delving into some dark  practices. Upon arriving at Meckalecha High, he finds it is terrorized by a nasty  gang of thugs led by Calvin Cooks (Aronne Baietti), best known as the Devil.  After his back is against the wall and he realizes no one will take a stand against  them, John Hammond the mild-mannered professor swallows the Sphere,  transforms into a ravishing beast and takes on the punks in a bloody rampage.
